'''Alecs Brellar''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

He served as [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the ''[[Onslaught]]'', and it was he who presented [[Wilek Nereus]] with the official badges of office as [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura's]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]], amid anti-Imperial protests.

{{Char-stub}}
